results.title: ‘We expect to dominate the Irish scrum’ — Japan boss Eddie Jones ups the ante ahead of Ireland clash
World Padel League to return to Mumbai with expanded sixth franchise season
results.description: The World Padel League returns to Mumbai from August 12-16, 2026, featuring six franchises and 36 elite players, marking a milestone for padel in India.

results.title: 2026 FIFA World Cup: France lead rankings as quarterfinal lineup is set
results.description: The 2026 FIFA World Cup has reached its final eight, with the tournament entering its decisive phase as heavyweight contenders, surprise packages and historic underdogs battle for a place in the semifinals. France remain the team to beat after edging Paraguay 1-0 in the Round of 16, with Kylian Mbappé’s second-half penalty sealing victory. Although [...] The post 2026 FIFA World Cup: France lead rankings as quarterfinal lineup is set appeared first on ANC .

results.title: Michael McGreevy carries Cardinals to win against Brewers

results.title: Japan winger Mitoma ‘apologetic’ after hitting cyclist with car
results.description: Mitoma missed the World Cup after suffering an injury playing in the Premier League less than a week before Japan named its squad for the tournament.
